sentences: Greenfield Bakery is now hiring part-time staff for its downtown location.
Applicants must be available on weekends and have at least six months of customer service experience.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this advertisement?
choices: (A) To promote a new bakery product
steps.kr: Greenfield Bakery는 시내 지점에서 파트타임 직원을 채용 중이다. 지원자는 주말 근무가 가능해야 하며 최소 6개월의 고객 서비스 경험이 있어야 한다.

sentences: The position offers a starting wage of $15 per hour with opportunities for advancement.
Interested candidates should submit a résumé and cover letter to hr@greenfieldbakery.com by Friday, March 15.
steps.question: By when must applications be submitted?
steps.kr: 해당 직책은 시간당 $15의 시작 임금과 승진 기회를 제공한다. 관심 있는 지원자는 3월 15일 금요일까지 이력서와 자기소개서를 제출해야 한다.

sentences: Greenfield Bakery has three locations across the city and is known for its award-winning sourdough bread.
The downtown branch sees the highest customer traffic and requires additional support during peak hours.
steps.question: What is suggested about the downtown location?
steps.question_kr: 시내 지점에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (B) It is the busiest of the three branches
(C) It sells the most sourdough bread
steps.kr: Greenfield Bakery는 시내 전역에 3개 지점이 있으며 수상 경력의 사워도우 빵으로 유명하다. 시내 지점은 고객 방문이 가장 많아 피크 시간대에 추가 지원이 필요하다.

sentences: TechMart is offering a 30% discount on all laptops and tablets this weekend only.
The sale runs from Saturday, June 8, through Sunday, June 9, at all participating stores.
steps.question: What is the main purpose of this notice?
choices: (A) To announce the opening of a new store
(B) To inform customers of a weekend sale
(C) To introduce a new product line
(D) To notify staff of policy changes
steps.kr: TechMart는 이번 주말에만 모든 노트북과 태블릿을 30% 할인 판매한다. 세일은 6월 8일 토요일부터 6월 9일 일요일까지 모든 참여 매장에서 진행된다.

sentences: Customers who spend over $500 will receive a free carrying case.
The discount cannot be combined with any other offers, and all sales are final.
steps.question: What will customers receive if they spend more than $500?
steps.question_kr: $500 이상 구매 시 고객이 받는 것은?
steps.kr: $500 이상 구매 고객은 무료 케이스를 받는다. 할인은 다른 혜택과 중복 적용이 불가하며 모든 판매는 환불이 되지 않는다.

sentences: TechMart accepts cash, credit cards, and mobile payments.
Store hours during the sale will be extended to 10 P.M. on both days.
Online purchases are not eligible for the weekend discount.
steps.question: Which is NOT mentioned about the TechMart sale?
steps.question_kr: TechMart 세일에 대해 언급되지 않은 것은?
steps.kr: TechMart는 현금, 신용카드, 모바일 결제를 받는다. 세일 기간 동안 매장 영업시간은 양일 모두 오후 10시까지 연장된다. 온라인 구매는 주말 할인 대상에서 제외된다.

sentences: The parking garage on Level B2 will be closed for maintenance from Monday, April 3, to Friday, April 7.
During this time, employees are encouraged to use the surface lot on Cedar Street.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this notice?
choices: (A) To announce the opening of a new parking lot
(B) To inform employees of a temporary parking closure
(C) To update parking rates for employees
(D) To introduce a new parking policy
steps.kr: B2층 주차장은 4월 3일 월요일부터 4월 7일 금요일까지 유지보수를 위해 폐쇄된다. 이 기간 동안 직원들은 Cedar Street의 지상 주차장을 이용하도록 권장된다.

sentences: Temporary parking passes for Cedar Street can be collected from the reception desk starting Monday morning.
Employees must display the pass on their dashboard at all times while parked.
steps.question: Where can employees get a temporary parking pass?
steps.question_kr: 직원들은 임시 주차권을 어디서 받을 수 있는가?
steps.kr: Cedar Street 임시 주차권은 월요일 아침부터 안내 데스크에서 받을 수 있다. 직원들은 주차 중에는 항상 대시보드에 주차권을 표시해야 한다.

sentences: The maintenance work includes resurfacing the floor and upgrading the lighting system.
Management apologizes for the inconvenience and thanks employees for their cooperation during this period.
steps.question: What is implied about the parking garage?
steps.question_kr: 주차장에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It will be permanently closed after repairs
(B) It will have new features after the maintenance
(C) It has never been repaired before
(D) It is located on the ground floor
choices_kr: (B) 유지보수 후 새로운 기능이 추가될 것이다
steps.kr: 유지보수 작업에는 바닥 재포장과 조명 시스템 업그레이드가 포함된다. 경영진은 불편을 드려 사과드리며 이 기간 동안 협조해 주신 직원들에게 감사드린다.

sentences: Riverside Grill is pleased to announce its new lunch special, available Monday through Friday from 11 A.M. to 2 P.M.
The special includes a main dish, soup, and a soft drink for just $12.
steps.question: What is being advertised?
steps.kr: Riverside Grill은 월요일부터 금요일 오전 11시부터 오후 2시까지 이용 가능한 새로운 점심 특선을 발표한다.

sentences: Customers can choose from five rotating main dishes each week, including grilled salmon, pasta, and steak.
Reservations are recommended but not required for groups of fewer than six people.
steps.question: According to the advertisement, what is true about reservations?
choices: (A) They are required for all customers
(B) They are not necessary for small groups
(C) They must be made one week in advance
steps.kr: 고객은 매주 5가지 순환 메인 요리 중에서 선택할 수 있다. 6인 미만 그룹에는 예약이 권장되나 필수는 아니다.

sentences: Riverside Grill has been serving the downtown community for over fifteen years.
The new lunch special is designed to attract nearby office workers looking for a quick and affordable meal.
steps.question: Who is most likely the target customer for this advertisement?
steps.question_kr: 이 광고의 주요 타겟 고객은 누구일 가능성이 가장 높은가?
steps.kr: Riverside Grill은 15년 이상 시내 지역 주민들에게 서비스를 제공해 왔다. 새로운 점심 특선은 빠르고 저렴한 식사를 원하는 인근 사무직 직원들을 유치하기 위해 기획되었다.

sentences: The Westside Public Library will adjust its operating hours beginning July 1.
The library will now be open Monday through Saturday from 9 A.M. to 8 P.M., and closed on Sundays.
steps.question: What is the purpose of this notice?
choices: (A) To announce the library's permanent closure
(B) To inform the public of new library hours
(C) To promote new books at the library
steps.kr: Westside Public Library는 7월 1일부터 운영 시간을 조정한다. 월요일부터 토요일 오전 9시~오후 8시 개방, 일요일 휴관.

sentences: Members who have items due on a Sunday may return them the following Monday without late fees.
The library's online catalog and e-book services will continue to be available 24 hours a day.
steps.question: What can members do if their items are due on a Sunday?
steps.question_kr: 일요일에 반납 기한인 경우 회원들은 어떻게 할 수 있는가?
choices: (A) Return items through a drop box outside
(B) Return them on Monday without a penalty
steps.kr: 일요일 반납 기한인 회원은 다음 월요일에 연체료 없이 반납할 수 있다. 온라인 카탈로그와 전자책 서비스는 24시간 계속 이용 가능하다.

sentences: The change in hours is due to budget reductions that have affected many city services.
Library officials hope to restore Sunday hours once funding becomes available.
steps.question: What is implied about the library's Sunday closure?
steps.question_kr: 도서관의 일요일 휴관에 대해 추론할 수 있는 것은?
choices: (A) It is expected to be permanent
(B) It may be reversed in the future
(C) It was requested by library members
(D) It will reduce the library's membership
steps.kr: 운영 시간 변경은 예산 삭감 때문이다. 도서관 관계자들은 재정 지원이 가능해지면 일요일 운영을 재개하길 희망한다.
